name: website-overlay
description: Click any UI element, describe changes, hand off to your AI coding tool. Browser extension + optional sidecar + framework plugins.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:ext && npm run build:sidecar && npm run build:plugins
scripts.build:ext: esbuild extension/content.ts --bundle --outfile=extension/dist/content.js --format=iife --platform=browser && esbuild extension/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=extension/dist/popup.js --format=iife --platform=browser && esbuild extension/background.ts --bundle --outfile=extension/dist/background.js --format=esm --platform=browser

author: Aryan Jain
